CustomField.description: Max value from the Onboarding Training Call Completed fields from contact or account. Change field label for to match OBS funnel stage name.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c)), ISBLANK(Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c) ), Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c)) ), Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c, IF( Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c > Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c, Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c, Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Onboarding Training Call Completed
